description.ko: 침식과 광맥의 색상과 질감을 강조한 지구 지각에 대한 매우 상세한 지형학적 연구입니다.
description.en: A highly detailed topographic study of Earth's crust, emphasizing the colors and textures of erosion and mineral veins.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Sedimentary Chronicle.' A top-down perspective of a desert canyon where #8B4513 sienna earth and #D2691E ochre sediment layers reveal ancient geological history. Sharp #F4A460 sand dunes drift across #2F4F4F slate mineral veins. The texture is extremely tactile, showing every grain of sand and crystalline fracture. Cinematic natural lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed geological mapping of land carved by time.
